MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David W. Edson, Senior Counsel Law Department (House counsel for CHEVRON 925/973-4523) for defendant CHEVRON SHIPPING COMPANY LLC moving for summary adjudication
Jeremy R. Fietz, Esq. of LANAHAN & REILLEY LLP 707/524-4200 for Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED AND TENTATIVE ADOPTED --
Re Cause of Action 1 -- denied -- triable issue of fact exist re breach of duty and causation per Plaintiff deposition.
Re Cause of ACtion 2 -- granted per non-opposition.
Re Cause of Action 3 -- treated as judgment on the pleadings and granted. 10 days leave to amend to plead statutory predicate for public policy termination.
(nr) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
